__warnings.note: 'Month of Mhoro' translated to 'Mois de Mhoro' — kept Shona 'Mhoro' verbatim as it's the brand-signature greeting. Reviewer: confirm consistency with rwen.json's welcome decision.
Names are playful/poetic ('Three-Day Spark', 'Week Warrior'). French equivalents are functional — reviewer should rewrite for emotional resonance.
'Bright Spark', 'Rising Star', 'Constellation' — translated literally. Reviewer free to substitute equivalent French metaphors.
'Halfway Tree' is a Jamaican idiom in the original — used 'À mi-chemin' here as the geographic reference doesn't carry. Reviewer: confirm or propose a French cultural anchor.
Plural form uses {{total}} — French plural agreement is automatic at the placeholder; verify {{total}} > 1 case reads naturally ('Terminé toutes les {{total}} leçons').

first_lesson.title: Premiers pas
first_lesson.description: Tu as terminé ta toute première leçon.
